nasb.text: You shall do the same with your oxen and with your sheep. It shall be with its mother seven days; on the eighth day you shall give it to Me.

esv.text: You shall do the same with your oxen and with your sheep: seven days it shall be with its mother; on the eighth day you shall give it to me.

cnv.text: 對於牛羊頭生的，你也要這樣作；七天之內，可以和母的在一起，第八天就要把牠獻給我。

ccb.text: 也要献上头生的牛羊，它们生下来后可以留在母亲身边七天，第八天要献给我。
